description: Income-eligible residents within the City of Tampa city limits can apply for relief funds as part of the County’s Rebuilding for Tomorrow Homeowner Repair and Reconstruction Program.
eligibility_criteria: Residents earning up to 120% of Area Median Income ($100,080 annual household income for a two-person household), with priority given to those earning 80% or less of Area Median Income ($66,800 annual household income for a two-person household).
incentive_amount: $350,000 to replace or rebuild storm-damaged housing; $10,000 - $50,000 in eligible reimbursement costs for permitted work already completed by the homeowner (minimum reimbursement is $10,000); or up to $150,000 in repairs that have not been completed or covered under other programs.

program_name: Dare to Own the Dream Homeownership Program
description: Down payment assistance loans to income eligible home buyers of property within the City limits of Tampa.
Due to limited funding available for the Housing Rehabilitation and Renovation Program, the City of Tampa is not currently accepting new applications.

Improves property conditions, aesthetics, aids in the elimination of slum and blight, and provides for the rehabilitation of the aging, exiting housing stock in the East Tampa Community Redevelopment Area.
eligibility_criteria: Within East Tampa CRA boundaries, single-family residence, applicant's primary residence, current on Property Taxes, homeowner's insurance, and mortgage payments (if applicable), total household income under 120% Area Median Income.

description: The Down Payment Assistance program provides a second mortgage loan to eligible home buyers to help them with down payment and closing costs.
The Florida Homeowner Assistance Program provides financial assistance to eligible homeowners who are struggling to pay their mortgage, property taxes, or insurance.
eligibility_criteria: Homeowners who are at least 60 days delinquent on their mortgage payments, have a household income at or below 150% of the area median income, and have not received assistance from another program in the past 12 months.

description: Government sponsored program to finance energy efficiency improvements, renewable energy improvements and wind resistance improvements.
